transcript.q:
Welcome, and thank you so much for coming in today. It's great to have you here. I hope you found the place okay and are feeling comfortable.

My name is Sarah, and I'll be conducting your interview for the Software Engineer position. We're really excited to be speaking with you today. We'll have a good conversation about your background, your technical skills, and just get to know you a little better as a candidate.

So let's start simple. Can you tell me a little bit about yourself and what drew you to apply for this Software Engineer role with us?
